props.period: The current period value. either `am` or `pm`.
props.useSeconds: Enables the display and selection of seconds in the timepicker.
props.value: The current value of the timepicker.
props.inputHints: Displays labels below the time input controls.
props.viewMode: The current view mode of the timepicker. Can be either `hour`, `minute`, or `second`.

events.update:period: Emitted when the period is changed. The event payload is either `am` or `pm`.
events.update:hour: Emitted when the hour value changes.
events.update:minute: Emitted when the minute value changes.
events.update:second: Emitted when the second value changes.
events.update:viewMode: Emitted when the view mode is changed. The event payload is either `hour`, `minute`, or `second`.
